creator: Example Studio
browserWalletNotes: Demo-only PR entry showing where a contributor would describe wallet support evidence.
tagline: A demo-only listing that shows contributors how to format a Monoscan dApp directory PR.
description: Example Arcade is not intended for merge. It is a sample listing used to demonstrate the one-file JSON contribution flow, category selection, network labeling, source fields, and browser wallet compatibility notes expected in a real directory pull request.
